message.entry: Trailing input arguments must occur in name-value pairs.
BinEdges must be a vector of length greater than or equal to 2.
''BinEdges'' input cannot be followed by any of ''NumBins'',''BinWidth'', ''BinMethod'', or ''BinLimits''.
X must be a numeric array.
''integers'' BinMethod is only supported if the absolute value of each input element is less than or equal to FLINTMAX/2.
